title: crotalaria teixeirae
intro: Crotalaria teixeirae, also known as the Teixeira's crotalaria or crotalaria teixeirae, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria teixeirae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, among other uses. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria teixeirae typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves or roots, which can be used to treat various ailments.
